title: argyranthemum coronopifolium
intro: Argyranthemum coronopifolium, also known as the daisy chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Argyranthemum coronopifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Argyranthemum coronopifolium can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, as well as being used in topical applications for skin conditions.
